widget.name: AxWeb App
widget.description: Web application layout with header, sidebar, agent panel, and content area

property.caption: Logo
property.description: Widget to display as the logo in the header

property.caption: Tasks menu
property.description: Widget for the tasks menu in the header

property.caption: Notifications menu
property.description: Widget for the notifications menu in the header

property.caption: User menu
property.description: Widget for the user menu in the header

property.caption: Sidebar
property.description: Widget for the sidebar navigation panel

property.caption: Main content
property.description: Widgets to display in the main content area

property.caption: Theme tokens (JSON)
property.description: JSON string with MUI theme overrides (palette, typography, shape, etc.)

property.caption: Agent chat
property.description: Widget for the agent chat panel
